name: groq
description: Run fast chat completions on Groq-hosted open models via the OpenAI-compatible Groq API

envVars.name: GROQ_API_KEY
envVars.description: Groq API key from the Groq console (starts with gsk_)

tools.name: List Models
tools.description: List the models available on Groq

historicalSummary.omitted: model capability details and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: Get Model
tools.description: Get details about a specific Groq model

tools.name: Create Chat Completion
tools.description: Generate a chat completion from a list of messages

model.description: Model ID to use, e.g. llama-3.3-70b-versatile

messages.description: Chat messages, each with role (system|user|assistant) and content

prompts.title: List Groq models
prompts.prompt: List the models available on Groq and note their context windows.

prompts.title: Generate a fast response
prompts.prompt: Use Groq to generate a response to a prompt I provide.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Groq API Setup

steps.title: Create a Groq account
steps.description: Go to https://console.groq.com and sign up or sign in. The free tier works for testing without billing.

steps.title: Create an API key
steps.description: Open https://console.groq.com/keys, click 'Create API Key', and give it a descriptive name (e.g. 'Veryfront Integration').

steps.title: Store the key
steps.description: Copy the key immediately — it is only shown once. Add it to your .env file as GROQ_API_KEY=gsk_...

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Run the List Models tool to confirm the key works. A 401 means the key is wrong or revoked.

notes: The API is OpenAI-compatible — requests use the /openai/v1 path prefix
Free-tier keys are rate limited per model; upgrade to a paid tier for higher limits
Chat completions are billed per token on paid tiers
